news.title: Blockbuster US job gains ruffle Wall Street
news.summary: Forecast-beating US jobs data rattled Wall Street on Friday as investors saw increased chances of an interest rate hike.Data showed the US economy added 172,000 jobs in May, far more than the 80,000 expected by economists polled by Dow Jones Newswires and The Wall Street Journal.
